result.stdout:
This tool is help to publish ZKEACMS Application.

Usage: Publish-ZKEACMS [options]

Options:
  -r|--rid <RID>            Runtime IDentifier.
                            https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/core/rid-catalog
  -p|--plugin <PLUGIN>      Use this argument to publish one plugin
  -i|--include-view-import  Create _ViewImports.cshtml in Views folder
  -f|--folder <FOLDER>      ZKEACMS project folder
  -o|--output <OUTPUT>      Output directory for publish
  -?|-h|--help              Show help information.

commands.payload:
This tool is help to publish ZKEACMS Application.

Usage: Publish-ZKEACMS [options]

Options:
  -r|--rid <RID>            Runtime IDentifier.
                            https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/core/rid-catalog
  -p|--plugin <PLUGIN>      Use this argument to publish one plugin
  -i|--include-view-import  Create _ViewImports.cshtml in Views folder
  -f|--folder <FOLDER>      ZKEACMS project folder
  -o|--output <OUTPUT>      Output directory for publish
  -?|-h|--help              Show help information.
